## Meeting Purpose

[Align on client ops priorities and unassigned tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Top Priorities:** New agentic pipelines (Webflow, Search.ai, Otto, Tavern) and automated publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [**Critical Blocker Removed:** The Webflow table formatting bug is fixed, unblocking the automation of publishing for multiple clients.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
  - [**"Strappy" Pipeline Fix:** A post-processing workflow will be implemented to correct persistent code block formatting errors.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [**Team Capacity:** Marcus is available after Thursday; Nicolas returns Thursday; Stevie will focus on agentic pipeline backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

## Topics

### Client Priorities & Backlog

  - [Andi prioritized the unassigned backlog to focus the team's capacity.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [**High Priority:**](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
      - [**Webflow:** New agentic pipeline for an expansion opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
      - [**Otto & Tavern:** Agentic pipelines to support teams coming out of strategy sprints and to alleviate team strain.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
      - [**Search.ai:** Agentic pipeline to support a 30-article/week volume.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Medium Priority:** Airbyte, Diligent.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1618.0)
  - [**Blocked:** Deep Grim (awaiting client info).](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)

### Automated Publishing

  - [**Problem:** Manual publishing is a major bottleneck (e.g., Suleiman published \>30 articles over the weekend).](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
  - [**Solution:** Prioritize automating publishing workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
  - [**Enabler:** The Webflow table formatting bug is fixed.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
      - [**Action:** Andi will ask teams to reopen relevant tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
      - [**Action:** Marcus will implement fixes as tickets are reopened.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)

### Pipeline Fixes & Updates

  - [**"Strappy" Pipeline (Code Blocks):**](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [**Problem:** Incorrect code block formatting persists in both old and agentic pipelines.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** The error originates in the outline generation step and propagates to the article.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
      - [**Fix:** Nicolas is testing a post-processing workflow for the old pipeline; Stevie will implement a similar fix for agentic pipelines.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [**Glossary Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
      - [**Plan:** Copy the existing Base 10 glossary pipeline to fulfill a new client request.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
  - [**Template Generator:**](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
      - [**Status:** In progress; the main challenge is ensuring high-quality, polished output.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [**Sentinel One:**](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
      - [**Status:** Final review today for a Thursday launch.](https://fathom.video/share/53oy7gQKDKqNkJZ6ZCFH4CWbz7tySyo1?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
